name: Hircine's Fortitude
description:
Invoke the Huntsman's blessing, healing you for 8002 Health. This portion of the ability scales off your Max Health. If you are at full Health you instead restore 3000 Stamina.

You also gain Minor Endurance and Minor Fortitude, increasing your Health and Stamina Recovery by 15% for 20 seconds.

While slotted you gain Major Brutality and Sorcery, increasing your Weapon and Spell Damage by 20%.
